scripts.prepare:sources:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const template=fs.readFileSync('sources/zivo_db.yaml','utf8'); const values={POSTGRES_HOST:process.env.POSTGRES_HOST||'postgres',POSTGRES_PORT:process.env.POSTGRES_PORT||'5432',POSTGRES_DB:process.env.POSTGRES_DB||'zivo',POSTGRES_USER:process.env.POSTGRES_USER||'zivo',POSTGRES_PASSWORD:process.env.POSTGRES_PASSWORD||''}; const rendered=template.replace(/\$\{([A-Z0-9_]+)\}/g, (_, key) => values[key] ?? ''); fs.mkdirSync(path.join('sources','zivo_db'), { recursive: true }); fs.writeFileSync(path.join('sources','zivo_db','connection.yaml'), rendered); fs.writeFileSync(path.join('sources','zivo_db','transactions.sql'), 'select
  id,
  amount,
  category,
  flagged,
  created_at
from public.transactions;
');"
scripts.build: npm run prepare:sources && evidence sources && evidence build
scripts.dev: npm run prepare:sources && evidence sources && evidence dev --host 0.0.0.0 --open /
scripts.preview: npm run prepare:sources && evidence sources && evidence preview
